caption: The video appears to be an educational lecture on cryogenic engineering, specifically focusing on the Linde-Hampson System. The presenter, Prof. M D Atrey from the Department of Mechanical Engineering at IIT Bombay, is explaining the mathematical relationships within this system. Initially, two key equations are displayed: one defining 'y' as a ratio involving enthalpies (h1', h2, hf), and another expressing h1' in terms of ε, h1, hg, and other variables. As the video progresses, the presenter guides the viewer through a step-by-step substitution process, combining these equations to derive a new expression for 'y'. This methodical approach aims to deepen the understanding of the thermodynamic principles underlying the Linde-Hampson refrigeration cycle.
